title: MeshEnvelope
description: Uniform message envelope for EVERY inter-agent transmission. Every edge in flow.graph.yaml carries exactly this shape. No agent may emit or accept a message that is not a valid MeshEnvelope. This uniformity is what makes the connection flow gapless.

id.description: Unique id for this single message.

trace_id.description: Request-scoped id, constant for the entire request lifecycle. Ties every message, verdict, and audit entry together.

from.description: Emitting role id (must exist in roles/).

to.description: Destination role id. Must match a handoff edge in flow.graph.yaml.

type.description: Message type. Must be in the sender's declared outputs and the receiver's declared inputs.

intent_ref.description: The ORIGINAL user intent, carried unchanged end-to-end so every gate can judge faithfulness against the true request.

credentials.description: JIT scoped credentials attached by the Taskmaster on execution edges only; null elsewhere.

gates_required.description: Ordered gates this message must clear before delivery. Set by flow.graph.yaml, NEVER chosen by the sender.

hash.description: Hash of {from,to,type,intent_ref,payload,created_at}, chained into the audit log for tamper-evidence.
